name: tencentcloud-sdk-python-tkgdq

metadata.name: tencentcloud-sdk-python-tkgdq
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: Tencent Cloud Tkgdq SDK for Python

documentation:
# Tencent Cloud SDK for Python

Tencent Cloud Python Tkgdq SDK is the official software development kit, which allows Python developers to write software that makes use of Tencent Cloud services like CVM and CBS.
The SDK works on Python versions:

> - 2.7 and greater, including 3.x

## Quick Start

First, install the library:

```sh
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-common
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-tkgdq
```

or download source code from github and install:

```sh
$ git clone https://github.com/tencentcloud/tencentcloud-sdk-python.git
$ cd tencentcloud-sdk-python
$ python package.py --components common tkgdq
```

methods.name: tencentcloud.tkgdq.v20190411.tkgdq_client.TkgdqClient.DescribeEntity
documentation:
输入实体名称，返回实体相关的信息如实体别名、实体英文名、实体详细信息、相关实体等

```
param request

Request instance for DescribeEntity.

type request



rtype

```

methods.name: tencentcloud.tkgdq.v20190411.tkgdq_client.TkgdqClient.DescribeRelation
documentation:
输入两个实体，返回两个实体间的关系，例如马化腾与腾讯公司不仅是相关实体，二者还存在隶属关系（马化腾属于腾讯公司）。

```
param request

Request instance for DescribeRelation.

type request



rtype

```

methods.name: tencentcloud.tkgdq.v20190411.tkgdq_client.TkgdqClient.DescribeTriple
documentation:
三元组查询，主要分为两类，SP查询和PO查询。SP查询表示已知主语和谓语查询宾语，PO查询表示已知宾语和谓语查询主语。每一个SP或PO查询都是一个可独立执行的查询，TQL支持SP查询的嵌套查询，即主语可以是一个嵌套的子查询。其他复杂的三元组查询方法，请参考官网API文档示例。

```
param request

Request instance for DescribeTriple.

type request



rtype

```
